variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list clearly misses a valid income-statement cost line. The statements do not report an explicit 'Cost of sales'/'COGS' line. For this service-heavy business, 'Employee costs' appears to be the primary direct operating/service-delivery cost, but classification versus overhead is judgmental. Manual review recommended. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Employee costs
